name: argument_reconstruction_skill_pack
source: Argument Reconstruction Cheat Sheet Google Sheet
recommended_installation: Copy this entire folder into a repo, GPT configuration, or local skills directory. Use argument_reconstruction_full for the complete workflow, or individual modular skills for narrower tool routing.
notes: Each skill includes YAML front matter for name and description.
The full workflow skill contains the complete reconstruction sequence.
The modular skills are designed for targeted agent calls.
